synopsis: "Hard Currency" was a four-part comic appearing in Dark Horse Extra #21-#24 which was published by Dark Horse Comics. Published March 2000. It was a follow-up to Star Wars: Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood, and is a lead-in to Star Wars: Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost. It was written by Randy Stradley, drawn by Isaac Buckminster Owens, lettered by Michael Taylor, and colored by Jason Hvam.
title: Hard Currency
